definitions.subtitle: ={{ $parameter["operation"] + ": " + $parameter["resource"] }}
definitions.description: Interact with all models available on Qwen Cloud

options.name: Set Automatically
options.description: Automatically set based on resource and operation

options.name: Set Manually
options.description: Manually set the description

properties.name: toolDescription
properties.default: Interact with all models available on Qwen Cloud
properties.description: Explain to the LLM what this tool does, a good, specific description would allow LLMs to produce expected results much more often

options.name: Message a Model
options.description: Create a completion with a Qwen model

properties.name: modelId

options.name: Qwen3 Max
options.description: Most capable model with best performance

options.name: Qwen3 Max (2026-01-23)
options.description: Qwen Max snapshot from 2026-01-23

options.name: Qwen3.5 122B-A10B
options.description: MoE model with 122B total / 10B active parameters

options.name: Qwen3.5 27B
options.description: Dense 27B parameter model

options.name: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B
options.description: Small MoE model with 35B total / 3B active parameters

options.name: Qwen3.5 397B-A17B
options.description: Large MoE model with 397B total / 17B active parameters

options.name: Qwen3.5 Flash
options.description: Faster, more cost-effective model

options.name: Qwen3.5 Flash (2026-02-23)
options.description: Qwen Flash snapshot from 2026-02-23

options.name: Qwen3.5 Plus
options.description: Balanced model with good performance and cost

options.name: Qwen3.5 Plus (2026-02-15)
options.description: Qwen Plus snapshot from 2026-02-15

properties.description: The model to use for generation

values.name: role
values.description: The role of the message sender

properties.name: simplify
properties.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

options.name: enableSearch
options.description: Whether to enable web search for up-to-date information

options.name: maxTokens
options.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

options.name: maxToolsIterations
options.description: Maximum number of tool-calling iterations before stopping. Set to 0 for unlimited.

options.name: repetitionPenalty
options.description: Penalty for token repetition. Higher values reduce repetition.

options.name: seed
options.description: Random seed for reproducible outputs

options.name: stop
options.description: Comma-separated list of sequences where the API will stop generating

options.name: system
options.placeholder: e.g. You are a helpful assistant

options.name: temperature
options.description: Controls randomness in the output. Lower values make output more focused and deterministic.

options.name: topK
options.description: Limits the sampling pool to top K tokens

options.name: topP
options.description: Nucleus sampling parameter. Lower values make output more focused.

options.name: Analyze Image
options.description: Take in images and answer questions about them

options.name: Generate an Image
options.description: Creates an image from a text prompt

properties.name: modelId

options.name: Qwen-VL Flash
options.description: Fast vision-language model

options.name: Qwen-VL Plus
options.description: Enhanced vision-language model

properties.description: The model to use for image analysis

properties.name: inputType
properties.description: How to provide the image for analysis

properties.name: imageUrl
properties.description: The URL of the image to analyze

properties.name: binaryPropertyName
properties.hint: The name of the input field containing the binary file data to be processed

properties.name: question
properties.description: The question or instruction about the image

properties.name: simplify
properties.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

options.name: temperature
options.description: Controls randomness in the output. Lower values make output more focused and deterministic.

properties.name: downloadImage
properties.description: Whether to download the generated image as binary data. When disabled, only the image URL is returned.

options.name: size
options.description: The size of the generated image

options.name: size
options.description: The size of the generated image

options.name: promptExtend
options.description: Whether to automatically extend and enhance the prompt

options.description: Generate a video from a text prompt

options.description: Generate a video from one or more images using Wan models

properties.placeholder: A cat playing with a ball of yarn

properties.name: resolution
properties.description: Resolution tier of the generated video

properties.name: duration
properties.description: Duration of the generated video in seconds (2–15)

properties.name: shotType
properties.description: Whether to generate a single-shot or multi-shot narrative video

properties.name: downloadVideo
properties.description: Whether to download the generated video as binary data. When disabled, only the video URL is returned.
